mapper.sql: id, title, account, empID, workNo, name, isDisabled
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into ehr_login
title,
account,
empID,
workNo,
name,
isDisabled,
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{empID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isDisabled,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update ehr_login
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
account = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
empID = #{empID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
workNo = #{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
isDisabled = #{isDisabled,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update ehr_login set title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, account = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, empID = #{empID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, workNo = #{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isDisabled = #{isDisabled,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from ehr_login
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
title = #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
account = #{account, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empID = #{empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{isDisabled, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

select count(1) from ehr_login
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
title = #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
account = #{account, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empID = #{empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{isDisabled, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

select * from ehr_login
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
title = #{model.title, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
account = #{model.account, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empID = #{model.empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{model.workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{model.isDisabled, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( title like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or account like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or workNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from ehr_login
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
title = #{model.title, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
account = #{model.account, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
empID = #{model.empID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{model.workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{model.isDisabled, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( title like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or account like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or workNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
